title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
